title.zh: 微信小程序逆向 III - KillWxapkg 自动化工具链实战
title.en: WeChat MiniApp Reverse III - KillWxapkg Automated Toolchain in Practice

description.zh: 介绍 2026 年主流自动化逆向工具链，重点推荐 KillWxapkg 工具的完整使用流程。
description.en: Introduce mainstream 2026 automated reverse engineering toolchains, focusing on KillWxapkg.

content.zh:
主流工具对比：
| 工具 | 自动化程度 | Hook 能力 | 推荐指数 |
| wux1an/wxapkg | 高 | 无 | ★★★★★ |
| zhuweiyou/wxapkg | 极高 | 无 | ★★★★☆ |
| KillWxapkg | 最高 | 内置通用 Hook | ★★★★★ |
| wxappUnpacker | 中 | 无 | 备用 |
| r0capture | 中 | 内存转储 | 补充 |
content.en:
Mainstream tools comparison:
| Tool | Automation | Hook Ability | Rating |
| wux1an/wxapkg | High | None | ★★★★★ |
| zhuweiyou/wxapkg | Very High | None | ★★★★☆ |
| KillWxapkg | Highest | Built-in Hook | ★★★★★ |
| wxappUnpacker | Medium | None | Backup |
| r0capture | Medium | Memory dump | Supplement |

annotation.zh: KillWxapkg 支持微信 4.x，2026 年仍活跃更新
annotation.en: KillWxapkg supports WeChat 4.x, still actively updated in 2026

content.zh:
KillWxapkg 核心优势：
- 自动化扫描、解密、解包、工程目录还原
- 内置通用 Hook：AES、RSA、MD5、wx.request
- 支持小程序分包自动合并
- 2026 年仍保持活跃更新
content.en:
KillWxapkg core advantages:
- Automated scan, decrypt, unpack, project restore
- Built-in hooks: AES, RSA, MD5, wx.request
- Support sub-package auto-merge
- Still actively updated in 2026

annotation.zh: 一站式完成从缓存到源码的全流程
annotation.en: One-stop complete flow from cache to source code

codeBlocks.code:
git clone https://github.com/Ackites/KillWxapkg
pip install -r requirements.txt
python main.py

# 鎵弿鏈湴鎵€鏈夊凡瀹夎鐨勫皬绋嬪簭
python main.py scan
# 瑙ｅ寘鎸囧畾鍚嶇О鐨勫皬绋嬪簭
python main.py unpack --name "灏忕▼搴忓悕绉?
# Hook妯″紡锛岃嚜鍔ㄦ彁鍙栧姞瀵嗗瘑閽?python main.py hook --name "鐩爣灏忕▼搴?

import json
ctx = json.loads(open("crypto_dump.json").read().splitlines()[-1])
key = bytes.fromhex(ctx["key"])
iv  = bytes.fromhex(ctx["iv"])

content.zh:
安装与运行：
git clone https://github.com/Ackites/KillWxapkg
pip install -r requirements.txt
python main.py
content.en:
Install and run:
git clone https://github.com/Ackites/KillWxapkg
pip install -r requirements.txt
python main.py

annotation.zh: 需要 Python 环境和 pip 包管理器
annotation.en: Requires Python environment and pip package manager

content.zh:
常用命令：
# 扫描本地所有已安装的小程序
python main.py scan

# 解包指定名称的小程序
python main.py unpack --name "小程序名称"

# Hook 模式，自动提取加密密钥
python main.py hook --name "目标小程序"
content.en:
Common commands:
# Scan all locally installed MiniApps
python main.py scan

# Unpack specified MiniApp by name
python main.py unpack --name "MiniApp name"

# Hook mode, auto extract encryption keys
python main.py hook --name "target MiniApp"

annotation.zh: 输出目录为 output/，包含完整工程目录
annotation.en: Output directory is output/, containing complete project

content.zh:
实战流程示例：
1. scan 扫描定位目标小程序
2. unpack 完成自动解密与解包
3. 将工程导入微信开发者工具
4. 启动小程序，自动输出 Hook 日志
content.en:
Practical workflow:
1. scan to locate target MiniApp
2. unpack for auto decryption and unpacking
3. Import project to WeChat DevTools
4. Start MiniApp, auto output Hook logs

annotation.zh: Hook 日志包含加密密钥、明文等关键信息
annotation.en: Hook logs contain encryption keys, plaintext, and other key info

content.zh:
自动化流水线目标：
- 小程序启动后自动提取加密密钥与 IV
- 自动完成请求参数加密
- 实现 HTTPS 接口脚本化调用
- 全程无需人工值守
content.en:
Automated pipeline goals:
- Auto extract encryption keys and IV on MiniApp start
- Auto encrypt request parameters
- Implement script-based HTTPS API calls
- Fully automated without manual intervention

annotation.zh: 将单次逆向升级为协议工程化分析
annotation.en: Upgrade from one-time reverse to protocol engineering analysis

content.zh:
Hook 输出结构化处理：
[AES] key = 0123456789abcdef...
[AES] iv  = fedcba9876543210
[AES] plain = {"uid":123,"token":"xxx"}

写入本地文件供后续脚本读取
content.en:
Hook output structuring:
[AES] key = 0123456789abcdef...
[AES] iv  = fedcba9876543210
[AES] plain = {"uid":123,"token":"xxx"}

Write to local file for subsequent script reading

annotation.zh: 结合 Python 脚本实现自动化协议复现
annotation.en: Combine Python scripts for automated protocol reproduction

content.zh:
常见问题与优化：
- 分包未合并：添加 --merge 参数
- 解密失败：先用 wux1an/wxapkg 预解密
- Hook 无输出：自定义 Frida 脚本补充 Hook 点

技术结论：仅靠 HTTPS、AES、动态密钥的防护，在工程化逆向面前存在明显局限
content.en:
Common issues and optimization:
- Sub-packages not merged: add --merge parameter
- Decryption failed: use wux1an/wxapkg for pre-decryption
- Hook no output: custom Frida scripts for additional hooks

Conclusion: HTTPS, AES, dynamic keys alone have clear limitations against engineering-level reverse

annotation.zh: 从单次分析升级为流水线作业
annotation.en: Upgrade from one-time analysis to pipeline operations
